title: Valkrien Skies TFC Compat Fix
description: A small Forge patch mod that restores compatibility between Valkyrien Skies (VS2) 2.3.0-beta12 and TerraFirmaCraft (TFC) on specific versions where VS's old TFC-compat mixin crashes due to method signature changes.
body:
A small patch mod to restore compatibility between **Valkyrien Skies 2.3.0beta-12** and **TerraFirmaCraft (TFC)** when the original VS TFC-compat mixin no longer matches TFC’s updated method signatures.

More Information on github: https://github.com/DXENDBucket/Valkrien-Skies-TFC-Compat-Fix
